feed_metal_strip_into_press.query: the worker supports a long narrow metal strip with both hands and feeds it into the working position of the press machine

walk_to_next_press.query: the worker leaves the first press machine and walks along the aisle to the adjacent press machine

pick_up_metal_sheets.query: the worker grasps and lifts several thin rectangular metal sheets from the material area of the press machine

align_metal_sheet_stack.query: the worker aligns the edges of the lifted stack of thin metal sheets with both hands
